## Checklist

- [ ] Builds successfully (`go build ./...`)
- [ ] Passes vet (`go vet ./...`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`go test -race ./...`)
- [ ] Updated README (if public API changed)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [conventional commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
